text: Moving from the first, bright and open architectural space into this vibrant and dynamic exhibition area, I feel a shift in energy. The cleanliness and emptiness of the previous room were almost meditative, inviting contemplation and solitude. Here, surrounded by colors, ideas, and interactive displays, I sense curiosity sparking within me. The promise of connection—between minds, between humans and technology—feels alive. I am both an observer and a participant, pondering how we innovate and understand our world together.
